Call Now Get Quote

Professional Court Construction Services

Championship-quality construction and resurfacing for pickleball, tennis, basketball, and multi-use athletic courts.

Pickleball Courts

Specialized construction with ideal cushioning, superior grip, and perfect dimensions. Our pickleball courts are built for the explosive growth of the sport with surfaces that enhance every dink, drive, and serve.

Learn More

Tennis Courts

Tournament-quality tennis court construction with cutting-edge surfacing technology and precision engineering. Courts that play fast, drain quickly, and maintain excellence season after season.

Learn More

Basketball Courts

Professional basketball courts built to dominate. Superior grip, precise measurements, and perfect ball response. Indoor flooring for championship games or outdoor courts that weather the elements.

Learn More

Court Resurfacing

Expert resurfacing services that restore tennis, pickleball, and multi-use courts. 15+ years of experience in both technical and artistic aspects of court surfacing.

Learn More

Court Conversion

Convert existing tennis courts to pickleball with proper line marking and surface modifications. Often more cost-effective than new construction while maintaining quality.

Learn More

Multi-Use Courts

Versatile court construction for facilities that need multiple sport capabilities. Custom layouts and surfacing that accommodate various athletic activities and community needs.

Learn More

Premium Surface Systems

We proudly use the following professional-grade surface products for optimal performance and durability.

PickleGrip

Specialized surface designed specifically for pickleball with enhanced grip and optimal ball response for precision play.

Cushion-X

Advanced cushioned surface system that provides superior player comfort while maintaining professional-level performance standards.

Pro-Cushion

Premium acrylic surface with integrated cushioning for reduced joint impact and enhanced player safety during extended play.

Ready to Start Your Court Project?

Get expert consultation and a detailed quote for your athletic court construction or resurfacing project.
